advancedTradingTips:
The set stop-profit stop loss will be automatically placed after the buy transaction:
  • 1. When the rising conditions are met, it will automatically sell according to the set ratio (take profit)
  • 2. When the falling conditions are met, it will automatically sell and stop loss
  • 3. Multi-stage strategies are triggered in order, and those that are met will be executed first.
  • 4. The total selling ratio cannot exceed 100%. The order can be cancelled manually on the chart

bindGoogleAuthReadmeP1:
Google Authenticator is a time-based one-time verification code tool used to enhance account security. 
Users need to install the Google Verifier App on their mobile phones and generate a set of verification codes every 30 seconds after binding the account.
bindGoogleAuthReadmeP2:
In order to ensure the security of Bot wallet assets, the platform will require users to complete secondary verification when performing withdrawals and transfers. 
The verification steps include: Enter the bound Google Verifier dynamic verification code.
bindGoogleAuthReadmeT2: Why do I need Google Verifier?
bindGoogleAuthStep1P1: iOS user login App Store Search "Authenticator" to download
bindGoogleAuthStep1P2: Android users log in to the app store or use their mobile browser to search for "Google Verifier" to download
bindGoogleAuthStep2P1: Open Google Authenticator, click the number in the lower right corner and click to scan the QR code (please scan again after refreshing the page). Be sure to save the key, it will not be retrieved if it is lost.
bindGoogleAuthStep3P1: Open Google Verifier, use the key or scan the QR code to add verification, and enter the 6-bit verification code on the Verifier after completion

crossWithdrawDesc: Cross-chain token withdrawals need to be verified at L2 (via zero-knowledge proof). The token withdrawal process takes up to about 2 hours. Ave will charge a certain handling fee as a mining fee.

Margin Ratio
Margin Ratio = Maintenance Margin / Margin Balance. Your positions will be liquidated once Margin Ratio reaches 100%.

maxCopyTradeTip:
The system will first calculate the「original purchase amount」 according to the ratio you set. If the amount exceeds the maximum purchase amount you set, only buy the maximum value to avoid buying too much at once.
Example: The target address bought 20 SOLs, and you set a 50% order fulfillment ratio. According to the ratio, you were supposed to buy 10 SOLs; But you only want to buy 5 SOLs at most once, so this time you will actually only buy 5 SOLs.

Once closed, the SOL used as the rent will be returned to you.

step1Tip1: Currently, Ave is not available on the Chinese mainland App Store. To download the Ave app, you’ll need to switch to a supported Apple ID region.
step2Tip1: Switch Apple ID in the App Store.
step2Tip2: the App Store, tap the avatar icon in the top right corner, and sign out.
step2Tip3: Sign in with an Apple ID registered in a supported region.
step2Tip4: If login fails, it might be due to device restrictions or security settings. Try logging in from the device settings directly. If the ID is locked, you may need to unlock it in the Apple ID settings.
step3Tip1: Once signed in, the App Store will automatically switch regions. Search for “Ave” in the App Store and tap Get to install.
step3Tip2: After installation, return to the home screen and open the Ave app.

takeProfitAndStopLoss4: Break-Even on Double + All-Out on Triple + 50% SL
takeProfitAndStopLoss5: All-Out on Tenfold + Trailing TP/SL (40% Drawdown)
takeProfitAndStopLoss6: All-Out on 40% TP + Trailing TP/SL (60% Drawdown)
takeProfitAndStopLossTips: You can set multiple take-profit or stop-loss rules. Once activated, new purchased tokens will follow these rules.
takeProfitAndStopLossTips1: Double out means that when the position profit reaches 100%, the system automatically closes all positions.
takeProfitAndStopLossTips2: Double the capital out means to close the position and pay out 50% of the capital when the profit reaches 100%; stop loss at half means to automatically close the whole position when the loss reaches 50%.
takeProfitAndStopLossTips3: Double all-out means that all positions will be closed when the profit reaches 100%; half-stop loss means that all positions will be automatically closed when the loss reaches 50%.
takeProfitAndStopLossTips4: Double out (100% profit and 50% of the position is closed); Triple out (the remaining position is 300% and the profit is all closed); Half stop loss (50% of the loss is all closed).
takeProfitAndStopLossTips5: 10 times take profit (1000% profit all-even); moving take profit means that all positions will be automatically closed when the price retraces 40% from the highest point.
takeProfitAndStopLossTips6: 40% take profit (40% profit closing); trailing take profit means that all positions will be automatically closed when the price retraces 60% from the highest point.

withdrawTips: Normal withdrawal is a two-step process. This step will initiate your withdrawal request, which will be processed in Layer2. Once the funds are ready (which may take up to 4 hours), you will receive a notification to withdraw funds to your wallet. Affected by chain synchronization and other circumstances, the time may be up to 48 hours. You are responsible for your own transaction gas fees.
